display_text: Cost: 155: Circlet. Basic component item providing +2 to all attributes. An early game value purchase to boost base stats for last hitting, spell damage, and survivability. Often combined with other basic items to create more advanced equipment. Stats: Attributes: +2 All Stats.

display_text: Cost: 155: Circlet. Provides +2 Strength, +2 Agility, and +2 Intelligence, making it a stat-efficient pickup for any hero role in the early game. The broad attribute gain improves health, mana, attack speed, damage, and armor simultaneously.

display_text: Cost: 155: Circlet. Primary early game utility, purchased at the start of the match to gain an immediate advantage in lane for last hitting and trading. The small all-around stat boost makes it a cost-effective choice before committing to more expensive items.
